title: Server APIs
overview: TapPay Backend / Server APIs. The server adapts the REST archetype, so all requests are sent using HTTP POST. Documents server-side payment APIs: Pay by Prime (pay using a prime token obtained from the frontend), Pay by Card Token (pay using a permanent card key and token, skipping createToken/payByPrime), Refund (reverse capture and authorization; supports partial refund), and Record (retrieve trade records). Also defines two asynchronous transaction-result callbacks: Frontend Redirect (browser redirect with query-string parameters after e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transactions) and Backend Notify (server-to-merchant JSON notification, retried at 1/2/4/8/16 minutes up to five times). Payment method categories are Direct Pay (card entered on merchant frontend through TapPay gateway), E-Payment (e-wallet accounts such as LINE Pay, JKOPay, Easy Wallet), and Token Pay (tokenized cards from Apple Pay / Google Pay / Samsung Pay). Recommended request timeout is 30 seconds.

environments.name: Sandbox
environments.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (code format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

environments.name: Production
environments.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (code format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

security_schemes.name: x-api-key
security_schemes.details: partner_key — Authentication key for each individual partner, sent in the x-api-key HTTP header (Header: x-api-key: YourPartnerKey). partner_key is also sent in the request body of each API.
security_schemes.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token / Refund / Record (code format blocks: Header x-api-key) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

endpoints.summary: Pay by Prime API — pay using the one-time prime token obtained from the frontend.
endpoints.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

endpoints.summary: Pay by Card Token API — pay using a permanent card key and token, skipping createToken and Pay by Prime.
endpoints.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-card-token-api

endpoints.summary: Refund API — refund a transaction, reversing capture and authorization; supports partial refund.
Record API — retrieve trade records (query transactions with filters and paging).

Frontend Redirect callback — after an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction completes, TapPay redirects the user to the merchant's frontend_redirect_url via web redirection, appending four transaction-result query-string parameters (rec_trade_id, order_number, bank_transaction_id, status). Merchant-hosted URL; path not defined by TapPay.

Backend Notify callback — after an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction completes, TapPay sends a server-to-merchant JSON notification to the merchant's backend_notify_url. Merchant must respond HTTP 200; otherwise TapPay resends at 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 minutes, up to five times. Merchant-hosted URL (https, port 443); path not defined by TapPay.

schemas.name: PayByPrimeRequest

fields.name: prime
fields.description: The one-time token returned from getPrime. Expires after 90 seconds. If using Apple Pay Deferred Payments, keep prime yourself (default duration 30 days). Test prime can be used in sandbox.

fields.name: partner_key
fields.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

fields.name: merchant_id
fields.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

fields.name: merchant_group_id
fields.description: Merchant management settings set on the portal; transactions performed according to the portal's payment configuration. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, transaction price should be times 100 (e.g. HKD1 = 100). See reference for each foreign currency's transaction limit. When using AFTEE, max amount is NT$9,999,999.

fields.name: merchandise_details
fields.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g. TWD.

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. May be customized but must be unique. Strongly recommended to define unique bank_transaction_id to avoid error 421: gateway time out.

fields.name: details
fields.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance; forwarded by TapPay if acquirer supports. Required by some acquirers; if omitted the transaction may fail.

fields.name: cardholder
fields.description: Information of the cardholder (see Cardholder schema). Feeds Fraud Detector and 3-D Secure risk verification.

fields.name: cardholder_verify
fields.description: Authentication (KYC) fields (see CardholderVerify schema). Supported: Direct Pay.

fields.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
fields.description: Merchant id that can only do authentication except authorization. Support Industry: property and life insurance / electronic payment.

fields.name: instalment
fields.description: Number of intervals of payments. Default 0. Support: Taishin Bank, National Credit Card Center of R.O.C., NewebPay, Cathay United Bank, E.SUN BANK, CTBC BANK, globalpayments, UNION BANK OF TAIWAN. Only Support: Direct Pay.

fields.name: delay_capture_in_days
fields.description: Days between bank authorization and actual capture. Default 0. Use -1 to disable automatic capture (self-capture).

fields.name: three_domain_secure
fields.description: Enable 3D Secure authentication. Default false. Only applicable to Direct Pay.

fields.name: result_url
fields.description: Transaction result notification URL object (see ResultUrl schema). Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions (when three_domain_secure = true).

fields.name: redeem
fields.description: Whether to use the redeem. Support: National Credit Card Center of R.O.C. Only Support: Direct Pay.

fields.name: remember
fields.description: Whether to store this payment method. If true, response returns card_secret (card_key and card_token) for future Pay by Card Token transactions. Supported for Direct Pay and some e-payments with binding support.

fields.name: additional_data
fields.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

fields.name: event_code
fields.description: Code defined by the bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

fields.name: product_image_url
fields.description: Picture of the store or product on the pay page. Same feature as line_pay_product_image_url; if both set, product_image_url is used.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy
fields.description: JKOPAY insurance details of property and life insurance transaction (see JkoPayInsurancePolicy schema). Support: JKOPAY.

fields.name: store_id
fields.description: Store branch ID. Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

fields.name: store_name
fields.description: Store name. Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

schemas.constraints: prime, partner_key, merchant_id, amount, cardholder are required. merchant_group_id cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time. Header requires Content-Type: application/json and x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (request table + format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: Cardholder

fields.name: cardholder.phone_number_country_code
fields.description: Phone number country code (default 886). Do not include symbols such as +.

fields.name: cardholder.phone_number
fields.description: Cardholder phone number. Must comply with E.164 format. Used for 3-D Secure checks.

fields.name: cardholder.name
fields.description: Name.

fields.name: cardholder.name_en
fields.description: If name_en is blank/invalid, a default value will be forwarded.

fields.name: cardholder.email
fields.description: Cardholder email address. Must conform to RFC 5322; if validation fails a default value is sent. Used for 3-D Secure checks.

fields.name: cardholder.zip_code
fields.description: Zip code number.

fields.name: cardholder.address
fields.description: Billing address.

fields.name: cardholder.national_id
fields.description: National ID.

fields.name: cardholder.member_id
fields.description: Member ID of the buyer or cardholder. Used for TapPay fraud detection and member management. Supported: Direct Pay.

fields.name: cardholder.bank_member_id
fields.description: Member ID of the cardholder or consumer, defined/exchanged between merchant and bank or e-wallet provider. Required for binding transaction on e-payments. Only supported by some e-payments.

schemas.constraints: Nested object used in both Pay by Prime and Pay by Card Token requests. phone_number, name, email are required within cardholder.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API (cardholder subtable) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: CardholderVerify

fields.name: cardholder_verify.phone_number
fields.description: Whether to verify phone number.

fields.name: cardholder_verify.national_id
fields.description: Whether to verify national id.

schemas.constraints: Authentication (KYC) fields. If a field is true, the corresponding cardholder information is sent to the acquirer for identity authentication. Supported: Direct Pay.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API (cardholder_verify subtable) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: ResultUrl

fields.name: result_url.frontend_redirect_url
fields.description: Frontend redirect URL of the merchant. Must start with https. After the transaction completes, TapPay redirects the customer to this URL via web redirection. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

fields.name: result_url.backend_notify_url
fields.description: Transaction result notification URL. After the transaction completes, TapPay sends a backend notification to this URL. Must start with https and only supports port 443. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

fields.name: result_url.go_back_url
fields.description: URL of the Go back button in the TapPay Payment Error page shown when customers execute the 3D secure process improperly. Can also be set in Developer > System Settings > Go back url in TapPay Portal.

schemas.constraints: Nested object used in Pay by Prime and Pay by Card Token requests. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions (when three_domain_secure = true).
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API (result_url subtable) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: JkoPayInsurancePolicy

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.proposer
fields.description: National id of proposer.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.insured
fields.description: National id of insured.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.insurance_type
fields.description: Insurance type. Refer to reference for spec details.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.policy_id
fields.description: Policy id, self-defined.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.payment_deadline
fields.description: Payment deadline.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.payment_frequency
fields.description: Payment frequency. Refer to reference for spec details.

fields.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy.final_price
fields.description: Insurance price. Sum of all insurance prices should equal the amount set in the Pay by Prime API.

schemas.constraints: Required when doing property and life insurance transaction via JKOPAY. Support: JKOPAY. The source marks these parameters as required when the JKOPAY insurance transaction is performed.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (jko_pay_insurance_policy subtable) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: PayByPrimeResponse

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Error message.

fields.name: rec_trade_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by TapPay server.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank.

fields.name: bank_order_number
fields.description: Acquirer's returned order number after authorization.

fields.name: auth_code
fields.description: Authorization code. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: card_secret
fields.description: Payment credential; contains card_key and card_token. Supported only for Direct Pay and some e-payments with binding support.

fields.name: card_secret.card_token
fields.description: Card token. Used when calling Pay by Card Token API.

fields.name: card_secret.card_key
fields.description: Card authorization key. Used when calling Pay by Card Token API.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, times 100 (HKD1 returns 100).

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code.

fields.name: card_info
fields.description: Card information (see CardInfo schema). Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction.

fields.name: acquirer
fields.description: Acquiring banks or payment processors.

fields.name: transaction_time_millis
fields.description: Time of transaction.

fields.name: bank_transaction_time
fields.description: Time when the bank handles the transaction.

fields.name: bank_result_code
fields.description: Response code from the bank.

fields.name: bank_result_msg
fields.description: Error message from the bank.

fields.name: payment_url
fields.description: Payment redirect url, send it to frontend. Not Support: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

fields.name: instalment_info
fields.description: Returned when use instalment and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains number_of_instalments (int), first_payment (int), each_payment (int), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: redeem_info
fields.description: Returned when use redeem and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains used_point (String), balance (String), offset_amount (String), due_amount (String), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: card_identifier
fields.description: Card identifier; each credit card corresponds to a unique identifier. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: merchant_reference_info
fields.description: Merchant reference information. Contains affiliate_codes (Array), returned when merchant uses Affiliate Code feature. Only Support: Direct Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

fields.name: event_code
fields.description: Code defined by bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

fields.name: is_rba_verified
fields.description: Whether this transaction got the risk score from RBA.

fields.name: transaction_method_details
fields.description: Transaction method details. Contains transaction_method (String: THREE_DOMAIN_SECURE or FRICTIONLESS) and transaction_method_reference (String: RBA or REQUEST).

schemas.constraints: Response object for Pay by Prime API. status=0 indicates success.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API Response / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: CardInfo

fields.name: card_info.bin_code
fields.description: First six digits of the card.

fields.name: card_info.last_four
fields.description: Last four digits of the card.

fields.name: card_info.issuer
fields.description: Card issuer.

fields.name: card_info.issuer_zh_tw
fields.description: Issuer Chinese name.

fields.name: card_info.bank_id
fields.description: Bank identifier.

fields.name: card_info.funding
fields.description: Card usage. -1 = Unknown, 0 = Credit Card, 1 = Debit Card, 2 = Prepaid Card.

fields.name: card_info.type
fields.description: Card type. -1 = Unknown, 1 = VISA, 2 = MasterCard, 3 = JCB, 4 = Union Pay, 5 = AMEX.

fields.name: card_info.level
fields.description: Card level.

fields.name: card_info.country
fields.description: Country of card issuer.

fields.name: card_info.country_code
fields.description: Country code of card issuer.

fields.name: card_info.expiry_date
fields.description: Card expired date. Format YYYYMM. Only returned for Direct Pay when remember = true.

schemas.constraints: Nested object in Pay by Prime and Pay by Card Token responses. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API Response (card_info subtable) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

schemas.name: PayByCardTokenRequest

fields.name: card_key
fields.description: Card authorization key.

fields.name: card_token
fields.description: Card token.

fields.name: partner_key
fields.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

fields.name: merchant_id
fields.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

fields.name: merchant_group_id
fields.description: Merchant management settings set on the portal. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, times 100 (HKD1 = 100).

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g. TWD.

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Must be unique. Recommended to define to avoid error 421.

fields.name: details
fields.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance; forwarded if acquirer supports.

fields.name: cardholder
fields.description: Information of the cardholder (see Cardholder schema).

fields.name: cardholder_verify
fields.description: Authentication (KYC) fields (see CardholderVerify schema). Supported: Direct Pay.

fields.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
fields.description: Merchant id that can only do authentication except authorization.

fields.name: instalment
fields.description: Number of intervals of payments. Default 0. Only Support: Direct Pay.

fields.name: delay_capture_in_days
fields.description: Days between authorization and capture. Default 0. -1 disables automatic capture.

fields.name: three_domain_secure
fields.description: Enable 3D Secure authentication. Default false. Only applicable to Direct Pay.

fields.name: result_url
fields.description: Transaction result notification URL object (see ResultUrl schema). Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

fields.name: card_ccv
fields.description: Security code. Cannot be used together with ccv_prime. Supported only for Direct Pay. Use when ccv_prime was not obtained but bank should verify the security code, or for 3DS 2.0 authentication with an AMEX card.

fields.name: redeem
fields.description: Whether to use the redeem. Support: National Credit Card Center of R.O.C. Only Support: Direct Pay.

fields.name: additional_data
fields.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

fields.name: ccv_prime
fields.description: One-time token of security code returned from get-ccv-prime. Cannot be used with card_ccv. Expires after 90 seconds. Support: Direct Pay. Sandbox test values provided in source.

fields.name: device_id
fields.description: ID of each device. Must be included when using TapPay RBA transaction risk analysis system. Obtain via Get Device ID of TapPay SDK.

fields.name: is_merchant_initiated_transaction
fields.description: Whether the transaction is a Merchant-Initiated Transaction (MIT) or Customer-Initiated Transaction (CIT). Default false. true = MIT (recurring, subscription), false = CIT.

fields.name: cardholderinfo_prime
fields.description: Obtain using get-cardholderinfo-prime.

schemas.constraints: card_key, card_token, partner_key, merchant_id, amount, currency, cardholder are required. merchant_group_id cannot be used with merchant_id. card_ccv and ccv_prime are mutually exclusive.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API (request table + format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-card-token-api

schemas.name: PayByCardTokenResponse

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Error message.

fields.name: rec_trade_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this transaction.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank.

fields.name: bank_order_number
fields.description: Acquirer's returned order number after authorization.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, times 100.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code.

fields.name: auth_code
fields.description: Authorization code. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: card_info
fields.description: Card information (see CardInfo schema). Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: update_cardholderinfo_result
fields.description: Latest cardholder information (masked) if update successful; empty string if no cardholder info provided or no update. Contains name_en, email, phone_number, phone_number_country_code (all masked-display Strings).

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction.

fields.name: acquirer
fields.description: Acquiring banks or payment processors.

fields.name: transaction_time_millis
fields.description: Time of transaction.

fields.name: bank_transaction_time
fields.description: Time when the bank handles the transaction.

fields.name: bank_result_code
fields.description: Response code from the bank.

fields.name: bank_result_msg
fields.description: Error message from the bank.

fields.name: payment_url
fields.description: Payment redirect url, send it to frontend. Not Support: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

fields.name: instalment_info
fields.description: Returned when use instalment and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains number_of_instalments, first_payment, each_payment (int), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: redeem_info
fields.description: Returned when use redeem and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains used_point, balance, offset_amount, due_amount (String), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: card_identifier
fields.description: Card identifier; unique per credit card. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: merchant_reference_info
fields.description: Merchant reference information. Contains affiliate_codes (Array). Only Support: Direct Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

fields.name: is_rba_verified
fields.description: Whether this transaction got the risk score from RBA.

fields.name: transaction_method_details
fields.description: Transaction method details. Contains transaction_method (String: THREE_DOMAIN_SECURE or FRICTIONLESS) and transaction_method_reference (String: RBA or REQUEST).

schemas.constraints: Response object for Pay by Card Token API. status=0 indicates success.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API Response / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-card-token-api

schemas.name: RefundRequest

fields.name: partner_key
fields.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

fields.name: rec_trade_id
fields.description: Identifier for the transaction being refunded.

fields.name: bank_refund_id
fields.description: Self-defined refund record identifier (half-shaped English number, must be unique). Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Only required for partial refund. Amount must include two decimal places (except TWD), e.g. 100 = $1.00. Instalment and T2P transactions do not support partial refunds.

fields.name: additional_data
fields.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

fields.name: merchandise_details
fields.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

schemas.constraints: partner_key and rec_trade_id are required. amount required only for partial refund.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Refund API (request table + format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#refund-api

schemas.name: RefundResponse

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Error message.

fields.name: refund_amount
fields.description: Amount being refunded. Except TWD, times 100 (HKD1 returns 100).

fields.name: refund_info
fields.description: Refund information; points and refund amount returned by the e-payment. Only returned for e-payment transactions from certain providers. Contains returned_reward_amount (Int) and returned_real_amount (Int).

fields.name: refund_id
fields.description: Identifier for the action refunded.

fields.name: bank_refund_order_number
fields.description: Refund order number that banks or e-wallets send back while refunding.

fields.name: is_captured
fields.description: Whether the transaction has been captured.

fields.name: bank_result_code
fields.description: Response code from the bank.

fields.name: bank_result_msg
fields.description: Error message from the bank.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code.

schemas.constraints: Response object for Refund API. status=0 indicates success.

schemas.name: RecordRequest

fields.name: partner_key
fields.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

fields.name: records_per_page
fields.description: Number of records on each page, up to 200. Default 50.

fields.name: page
fields.description: The returned page. Default 0.

fields.name: filters
fields.description: Restrictions on the trade records (see RecordFilters schema). Default None. Possible filters: time (required within filters, frame ≤ 90 days), amount, cardholder, merchant_id, record_status, rec_trade_id, order_number, bank_transaction_id, auth_code, currency, tsp, card_identifier.

fields.name: order_by
fields.description: Criteria for ordering. Default attribute = time, is_descending = true. Contains attribute (String: "time" or "amount") and is_descending (boolean).

schemas.constraints: partner_key is required. Within filters, time is required and its time frame should be 90 days or less.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Record API (request table + format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#record-api

schemas.name: RecordFilters

fields.name: filters.time.start_time
fields.description: Start time of the query time frame (time filter, frame ≤ 90 days).

fields.name: filters.time.end_time
fields.description: End time of the query time frame.

fields.name: filters.amount.upper_limit
fields.description: Upper amount limit filter.

fields.name: filters.amount.lower_limit
fields.description: Lower amount limit filter.

fields.name: filters.cardholder.phone_number
fields.description: Cardholder phone number filter.

fields.name: filters.cardholder.name
fields.description: Cardholder name filter.

fields.name: filters.cardholder.email
fields.description: Cardholder email filter.

fields.name: filters.merchant_id
fields.description: Array of merchant_id filters.

fields.name: filters.record_status
fields.description: Record status filter.

fields.name: filters.rec_trade_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier filter.

fields.name: filters.order_number
fields.description: Order number filter.

fields.name: filters.bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Bank transaction id filter.

fields.name: filters.currency
fields.description: Currency filter.

schemas.constraints: Nested filters object in Record request. The request table also lists auth_code, tsp, and card_identifier as possible filters (not shown in the JSON example). time is required within filters and its time frame must be ≤ 90 days.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Record API (filters table + format block) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#record-api

schemas.name: RecordResponse

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 2 indicates end of list (no more records under the given filter).

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Error message.

fields.name: records_per_page
fields.description: Number of records on each page, up to 200.

fields.name: page
fields.description: The returned page.

fields.name: total_page_count
fields.description: Total number of pages.

fields.name: number_of_transactions
fields.description: Total number of transactions.

fields.name: trade_records
fields.description: Trade records.

schemas.constraints: Response object for Record API. status=2 indicates end of list. The internal structure of trade_records array items is not detailed in this source.

schemas.name: FrontendRedirectQuery

fields.name: rec_trade_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by TapPay server.

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. May be customized but must be unique.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

schemas.constraints: Query-string parameters appended by TapPay to the merchant's frontend_redirect_url after an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction. Request Header Content-Type: html/text. Frontend redirect could be faked; TapPay recommends implementing backend notify and using Record API to verify.
schemas.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Frontend Redirect (Request Query String) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#frontend-redirect

schemas.name: BackendNotifyBody

fields.name: rec_trade_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by TapPay server.

fields.name: auth_code
fields.description: Authorization code. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: bank_transaction_id
fields.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Recommended to define unique to avoid error 421.

fields.name: bank_order_number
fields.description: Acquirer's returned order number after authorization.

fields.name: order_number
fields.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Transaction price.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

fields.name: msg
fields.description: Error message.

fields.name: transaction_time_millis
fields.description: Time when the bank handles the transaction.

fields.name: transaction_complete_millis
fields.description: Time when transaction completed (support E.SUN, Cathay Bank).

fields.name: pay_info
fields.description: E-payment related information object (see PayInfo schema). Only returned for e-payment transactions.

fields.name: acquirer
fields.description: Acquiring banks or payment processors.

fields.name: e_invoice_carrier
fields.description: Electronic invoice carrier information. Support: JKOPAY, Plus Pay. Contains type (Int(3): 0 mobile phone barcode, 1 natural person certificate barcode, 2 other carrier barcodes), number (String(100)), donation (Boolean), donation_id (String(50)).

fields.name: card_identifier
fields.description: Card identifier; unique per credit card. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

fields.name: bank_result_code
fields.description: Response code from the bank.

fields.name: bank_result_msg
fields.description: Error message from the bank.

fields.name: merchant_reference_info
fields.description: Merchant reference information. Contains affiliate_codes (Array). Only Support: Direct Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay.

fields.name: instalment_info
fields.description: Returned when use instalment. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains number_of_instalments, first_payment, each_payment (int), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: redeem_info
fields.description: Returned when use redeem and non-3D transaction. Only Support: Direct Pay. Contains used_point, balance, offset_amount, due_amount (String), extra_info (JSONObject).

fields.name: event_code
fields.description: Code defined by bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

fields.name: merchandise_details
fields.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

schemas.constraints: Request body sent by TapPay to the merchant's backend_notify_url after an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction. Request Header Content-Type: application/json. Sent to https://{backend_notify_url} (Sandbox and Production). Merchant must respond HTTP 200 or TapPay resends at 1/2/4/8/16 minutes, up to five times.

schemas.name: PayInfo

fields.name: pay_info.method
fields.description: Method used by the consumer to complete the e-payment: 1. CREDIT_CARD, 2. BALANCE (Electronic Payment Account), 3. POINT (Point Redeem), 4. DISCOUNT, 5. ACCOUNT_LINK (Bank Account), 6. CREDIT_BNPL (Buy Now Pay Later).

fields.name: pay_info.masked_credit_card_number
fields.description: Masked card number. Only supported by some e-payments.

fields.name: pay_info.point
fields.description: Amount of the point discount; 0 if no offset.

fields.name: pay_info.discount
fields.description: Amount of the coupon discount; 0 if no offset.

fields.name: pay_info.credit_card
fields.description: Amount paid using credit card; 0 if not used.

fields.name: pay_info.balance
fields.description: Amount paid using wallet stored-value account; 0 if not used.

fields.name: pay_info.bank_account
fields.description: Amount paid using linked bank account; 0 if not used.

fields.name: pay_info.bin_code
fields.description: First six to eight digits of the card. Returned only when using Plus Pay.

fields.name: pay_info.identity
fields.description: Pay tool identity, provided by electronic payment service; may be partial account number or credit card number.

fields.name: pay_info.tool_name
fields.description: Name of the e-payment method. AccountLink or credit card returns the bank name; e-payment account returns the provider name.

fields.name: pay_info.manual_review
fields.description: Whether the BNPL order requires manual review. Supported payment method: OP Pay, GoGoPay.

fields.name: pay_info.bnpl_instalment_info
fields.description: BNPL order information. Contains term_lengths (Int) — number of instalments selected by the consumer; if paid in full the value is 1.

fields.name: pay_info.payment_provider
fields.description: Transaction settlement and payout provider, only supports LINE Pay: EPI = handled by LINE Pay Electronic Payment; TSP = handled by a non-LINE Pay Electronic Payment provider.

schemas.constraints: Nested object within Backend Notify pay_info. Only returned for e-payment transactions; unset parameters may be empty strings or zero.

errors.meaning: status: Success. Response code 0 indicates the request succeeded.
status (Record API): End of list — there are no more records to be shown under the given filter.
errors.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Record API Response (status field) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#record-api

errors.meaning: Gateway time out. Referenced as 'error 421: gateway time out'; TapPay recommends defining a unique bank_transaction_id to avoid it. The source does not document the HTTP status for this error.
errors.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime / Pay by Card Token / Frontend Redirect / Backend Notify (bank_transaction_id notes) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: The server adapts the REST archetype, so all requests are sent using HTTP POST. Header requires Content-Type: application/json and x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Overview / code format blocks / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#overview

operational.detail: To ensure information is correct, set request timeout to 30 seconds. During peak hours banks might take longer to process transactions.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API / Refund API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: The prime token may only be used once; create a new token before each Pay by Prime call. Prime expires after 90 seconds (Apple Pay Deferred Payments default 30 days). Test prime available in sandbox.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: For a 3D secure transaction set three_domain_secure = true and fill in frontend_redirect_url and backend_notify_url. Only applicable to Direct Pay.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Pay by Card Token API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: After receiving the frontend redirect url and before showing the transaction result page, call the Record API (using rec_trade_id) to check the latest transaction result, avoiding status inconsistency due to unsuccessful Backend Notify receipt. Frontend redirect could be faked, so implement backend notify; if backend notify fails use Record API to verify.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / Frontend Redirect / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: If remember = true, the Pay by Prime response returns card_key and card_token; save them and call Pay by Card Token to handle recurring transactions on a fixed date/period/amount, skipping createToken. Not supported for Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay, JKOPAY, Easy Wallet, Atome, Pi Wallet, Plus Pay.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: TapPay automatically sends a backend notification to backend_notify_url. If the merchant does not respond HTTP 200, TapPay resends at 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 minutes, up to five times; if all fail a notification letter is sent to the contact and technical email. backend_notify_url must use https and only supports port 443.

Refund reverses both capture and authorization; partial refund uses the amount field (two decimal places except TWD). Instalment and T2P transactions do not support partial refunds. TapPay sends the refund request to banks the same day; verify status via TapPay Portal or Record API the next day. Refund API cannot be called during acquiring banks' capping time.
Transaction amount is an integer. Except TWD, transaction price should be times 100 (e.g. HKD1 = 100). When using AFTEE, max amount is NT$9,999,999.
operational.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API (amount) / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

operational.detail: records_per_page defaults to 50, up to 200. page defaults to 0. Within filters, the time frame should be 90 days or less. Default ordering is by time, descending.

Direct Pay = customer enters card info on merchant frontend through TapPay gateway. E-Payment = e-wallet accounts (LINE Pay, JKOPay, Easy Wallet, etc.); supported fields and behaviors vary by provider. Token Pay = tokenized credit cards from mobile wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay).

missing: HTTP status codes for status/msg error codes are not documented (status 0 success, status 2 record end, error 421 gateway timeout — no HTTP status given)
full list of possible status/msg error codes beyond 0, 2 and 421 is not enumerated in this source (msg error messages not listed)
Record API trade_records array item structure is not detailed
Backend Notify Request Url shows placeholder https://{backend_notify_url} for both Sandbox and Production; no fixed TapPay-hosted path
Frontend Redirect and Backend Notify are merchant-hosted callbacks; their URL paths are defined by the merchant, not TapPay (endpoint path=null)
request/response field 'required' flags for response objects and callback payloads are not stated (marked null)

several fields reference external reference.html pages (e.g. currency limits, bank_transaction_id format rule, extra_info, e-payment support list, cardholder verify rules) whose detailed content is not in this source
